Choose Your Challenge

Race Categories

7K

The Starter

Perfect for beginners and families who want to enjoy a healthy morning run for a good cause.

₱ 600 Registration Fee
12K

The Challenger

A solid test of endurance for casual runners looking to push their limits on race day.

₱ 750 Registration Fee
22K

The Warrior

The ultimate distance for seasoned runners — go the extra mile for the brethren and the community.

₱ 950 Registration Fee
Easy Registration

How to Join

1

Fill Out the Registration Form

Complete the online form with your name, age, contact details, and chosen distance.

2

Read & Sign the Waiver

Review and accept the event waiver acknowledging the standard risks of a running event.

3

Pay the Registration Fee

Send your payment via the official channel. (Add your GCash / bank details here — a name and method is safer than a full account number.)

4

Upload Proof of Payment

Take a clear screenshot or photo of your receipt and upload it with your registration.

5

Wait for Confirmation

Our team will verify your registration. Once approved, you'll receive your race bib number and event updates.

6

Claim Your Race Kit

Present your confirmation message and a valid ID during the scheduled race kit claiming.

Run for a Purpose

Every Step Counts

The AMML235 Fun Run is more than a race — it's a celebration of fellowship and service. Proceeds support the charitable projects of Apolinario Mabini Masonic Lodge No. 235, including our flagship Bawat Bata Mahalaga program for schoolchildren. (Replace with your run's specific beneficiary.)

Ready to Run?
